collectionName: Sprint 4 Task 4 — Targeted Brand Logo Extraction

collector.tool: Official public source extraction through available web/GitHub tooling
collector.notes: Apify was not exposed in the active connector list during this follow-up turn, so this pass records only logo URLs directly discoverable from official public pages. Records remain candidate-only and are not approved, imported, uploaded to Sanity, published, or hotlinked.

colours.source: Colour values not extracted by this targeted pass.

targetedResults.rightsTrademarkNotes: Official Leinster Rugby homepage exposes a Leinster Rugby image reference and the clicked image target resolved to a CloudFront-hosted Leinster logo SVG. Candidate reference only; verify rights and upload approved asset to Sanity before public use.

rawSourceMetadata.sourceEvidence: Official Leinster Rugby homepage image reference and clicked image target.
rawSourceMetadata.httpStatusCode: page 200; image fetch cache miss in extraction tool but URL resolved from clicked image target

colours.source: Colour values not extracted by this targeted pass.

targetedResults.rightsTrademarkNotes: Official Ulster Rugby homepage exposes Ulster Rugby image references for fixture/team contexts, and the clicked image target resolved to an Ulster-hosted team icon PNG. Candidate reference only; verify rights and upload approved asset to Sanity before public use.

rawSourceMetadata.sourceEvidence: Official Ulster Rugby homepage image reference and clicked image target.

colours.source: Colour values not extracted by this targeted pass.

targetedResults.rightsTrademarkNotes: Official Connacht Rugby homepage was accessible, but the available extraction did not expose a reliable club logo asset URL. Keep unresolved until Apify/browser extraction or manual official-asset review is available.

rawSourceMetadata.sourceEvidence: Official Connacht Rugby homepage context only; no reliable logo URL captured.

colours.source: Colour values not extracted by this targeted pass.

targetedResults.rightsTrademarkNotes: The SA Rugby source redirects to the official Springboks site and exposes SARU / Springboks image references, but the available extraction did not return a reliable direct asset URL. Keep unresolved until Apify/browser extraction or manual official-asset review is available.

rawSourceMetadata.sourceEvidence: Official Springboks/SARU homepage image references only; no reliable logo URL captured.

followUpRequired: Run a full browser extraction when Apify is visible again for Connacht Rugby, South African Rugby Union and the remaining empty-logo union records.
Validate every candidate logo URL in Sanity before approval.
Do not hotlink any candidate logo URL in public templates.
Upload any approved logo file into Sanity assets before frontend use.
